notes:
v1.4.5 Hotfix
🐛 Glyph line alignment: Glyph playback now uses the editor's centered square coordinate space, so traced lines and background sigils stay aligned on wide or tall displays.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.5
announcement.content:
Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.5 fixes glyph line alignment.

  • Glyph line alignment: Glyph playback now uses the same centered square coordinate space as the editor, keeping traced lines and background sigils aligned on non-square displays.
